overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a fur cloak running through a snowy mountain landscape toward a massive stone gate structure. The sky is dominated by a colossal burning Erdtree casting an ominous red-orange glow over the scene. The character passes through the ancient archway and emerges into an open vista featuring distant waterfalls and floating ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path approaching monumental stone gate

agents.ego_description: running steadily through deep snow toward the massive ancient gate structure

entered.detail: colossal ancient stone structure with twin arches dominating the horizon
apocalyptic red-orange burning tree filling the sky with fiery light
tall ghostly white trees glowing with pale blue light lining the path
dark jagged rock formations flanking the snowy path

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a snowy mountain valley flanked by rocky cliffs and luminescent white trees. Ahead looms a massive stone gate structure silhouetted against the burning red sky of the Erdtree.

events.description: character enters the shadow of the massive stone archway
character turns right while exiting the archway to navigate around the structure

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone archway and turning right to navigate around the gate structure

entered.detail: intricately carved stone ceiling of the archway passage
massive decorated stone columns supporting the archway

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the massive stone archway, briefly sheltered from the burning sky. The camera follows as the character turns right to navigate around the gate structure, revealing new angles of the carved stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain vista with distant waterfalls and floating ruins

events.description: emerging from the gate into open landscape with visible waterfalls
distant floating ruins and massive waterfall become prominent in the valley ahead

agents.ego_description: running along the snowy ridge toward the distant vista with waterfalls and ancient ruins

entered.detail: massive cascading waterfall descending from the cliff faces in the distance
ancient stone structures suspended in mid-air above the valley
collapsed stone columns scattered along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the landscape opens into a breathtaking vista featuring massive waterfalls cascading down distant cliffs and floating ruins suspended in the air. The character continues running along the snowy path as the burning Erdtree dominates the left side of the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, snowy mountain valley into a vast, open vista dominated by floating ruins. It begins with a character running through a valley flanked by rocky cliffs and luminescent white trees, moving toward a massive stone gate silhouetted against a burning red sky. As the character passes beneath the shelter of the stone archway, the camera follows a rightward turn to navigate the carved architecture of the gate. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the structure, revealing a breathtaking landscape of massive waterfalls cascading down distant cliffs and ruins suspended in the air. Finally, the camera continues along the snowy path while the colossal burning Erdtree remains a dominant presence in the sky.
